====Pokémon==== This listing is of Hau's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Hau |pkmn=Decidueye |stage1=Dartrix |gender=Unknown |type1=Grass |type2=Ghost |img=Hau Dartrix.png |cap=Hau's Dartrix |img2=Hau Decidueye.png |cap2=Hau's Decidueye |epnum=SM097 |epname=No Stone Unturned! |vajp=Shin-ichiro Miki |vaen= |desc={{p|Decidueye}} first appeared as a {{p|Dartrix}} in ''[[SM097|No Stone Unturned!]]'', where it battled [[Ash's Rowlet]] and was able to win. The next day, Dartrix went up against Rowlet in a [[rematch]], where it was eventually knocked out by {{m|Bloom Doom}}. When {{Ash}} met Hau again in ''[[SM128|League Offenders and Defenders!]]'', Dartrix was revealed to have evolved into Decidueye. Hau later used Decidueye during the battle against [[Team Skull]], where it went up against [[Rapp]] and her {{p|Zubat}} and won. In ''[[SM132|Imitation Is the Sincerest Form of Strategy!]]'', Hau chose Decidueye as his Pokémon to face against Ash's Rowlet in the second round of the [[Manalo Conference]]. After a hard fought battle Decidueye was knocked out by Rowlet's {{m|Brave Bird}}, eliminating Hau from the tournament. Decidueye reappeared in a flashback in ''[[SM138|Final Rivals!]]''. In ''[[SM140|Z-Move Showdown!]]'', Decidueye was used to battle a {{Shiny}} {{DL|Ultra Beasts (anime)|Shiny Guzzlord|Guzzlord}} to prevent it from the destroying the Manalo Stadium. With a combination of Z-Moves, Decidueye, among others, managed to send the Shiny Guzzlord back into its [[Ultra Wormhole]]. Decidueye was later seen watching Ash and {{an|Professor Kukui}}'s {{wp|exhibition game|exhibition match}} alongside its {{pkmn|Trainer}}. From ''[[SM141|Exhibition Unmasked!]]'' to ''[[SM144|From Z to Shining Z!]]'', Decidueye watched the [[Full Battle]] between Ash and {{an|Professor Kukui}} alongside Hau. In ''[[SM146|Thank You, Alola! The Journey Continues!]]'', Decidueye was seen battling [[Nanu]] and his {{rf|Alolan}} {{p|Persian}}. In ''[[JN112|Helping the Hometown Hero!]]'', Decidueye joined Hau in watching a [[Battle Royal]] match at the [[Battle Royal Dome]]. Decidueye's known moves are {{m|Razor Leaf}}, {{m|Leaf Blade}}, {{m|Spirit Shackle}}, and {{m|Sky Attack}}.
Decidueye can also perform the Z-Move {{m|Sinister Arrow Raid}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Hau |pkmn=Raichu |type1=Electric |type2=Psychic |img=Hau Raichu.png |epnum=SM129 |epname=Battle Royal 151! |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{rf|Alolan}} {{p|Raichu}} is Hau's second Pokémon, which first appeared in ''[[SM129|Battle Royal 151!]]'', where it was used in the [[Battle Royal]] preliminary round of the [[Manalo Conference]], being able to progress its Trainer to the actual tournament. In ''[[SM130|Battling Besties!]]'', Hau used Raichu in his match against [[Samson Oak]] and his Alolan {{p|Exeggutor}}. The battle ended in Hau's victory, advancing him to the second round. Raichu's known moves are {{m|Thunderbolt}}, {{m|Quick Attack}}, and {{m|Focus Blast}}.}}
